description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:20" Wall Mounted Bathroom Storage Cabinet with Mirror, Medicine Cabinet with Height Adjustable Shelf, Over the Toilet Space Saver Cabinet

Place of Origin:Viet Nam

Main Color:Black

Main Material:Solid Wood+MDF

Number of Shelves:2

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):20.00

Assembled Width (in.):7.10

Assembled Height (in.):27.80

Product Weight (lbs.):24.03

Package Size

Length (in.):30.00

Width (in.):18.50

Height (in.):7.50

Weight (lbs.):28.22

Product Features

  • [2-in-1 Bathroom Mirror & Medicine Cabinet] This bathroom mirror cabinet seamlessly combines storage and mirror functions. Designed for versatility, it features a crystal-clear mirror while providing hidden space behind the door to organize bathroom essentials.
  • [Ample storage] With the overall dimension of 20 inches and 2 layers of storage shelves adjustable, The shelves can accommodate most sizes of shampoo or body wash bottles on the market and will serve the needs of you. The bathroom medicine cabinet includes shelves and a mirrored door for privacy, helping to reduce clutter and maximize space.
  • [High-Quality Material] Unlike ordinary wall cabinets, wall mounted bathroom storage cabinet is made from the combination of solid wood and MDF Boards. It offers excellent waterproof performance, effectively protecting the cabinet in humid bathroom conditions and ensuring long-lasting durability in most bathroom environments.
  • [No Bumping Soft-Close Door] Thanks to the renowned brand hinges with the silent soft-close technology, you are allowed to feel at ease closing the door through a gentle push, then just walk away and there won't be an annoying heavy bumping noise falling on your ears.
  • [Minimalist Chic Style] Accentuated by a mirrored door, it reflects light beautifully, elevating the overall aesthetic with sophistication.

Descriptions

Detail with Stunning Clarity

The bathroom cabinet features a spacious mirror that captures every detail with stunning clarity. Whether for morning routines or evening skincare, it's your high-definition assistant.

A Touch of Elegance

With its clean, minimalist design, this cabinet complements any bathroom decor, adding a touch of elegance. The exquisite pattern carvings give you a noble usage experience.

Perfectly Blending Functionality and Aesthetics

The cleverly designed mirror cabinet combines storage and mirror functions, meeting your daily storage needs with providing a practical bathroom mirror. It saves space and adds a sleek, modern touch to your bathroom, perfectly blending functionality and aesthetics.

Dimension & Weight

Dimension of Overrall Product20'' *7.1 '' * 27.8''
Dimension of Storage Cabinet18.8'' *6.5 '' * 27.1''
Weight of Overroll Product24.03 lbs
